rows.label: qev085707_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey.
The mission was just officially posted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0002
rows.name: You should've seen old man Vandham's eyes go wide when I reported it complete five minutes later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0003
rows.name: So it went exactly as you planned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0004
rows.name: I handled the paperwork so the reward will be wired to us fifty-fifty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0005
rows.name: A happy ending, as they call it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0006
rows.name: [ST:undisp ][ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0007
rows.name:
You look like you've got something to say.
Is it about killing those native creature younglings back there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0008
rows.name: It's not that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0009
rows.name: That area is a necessary location for NLA, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0010
rows.name: [ST:undisp ][ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0011
rows.name: But back then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0012
rows.name: You looked so pained after you pulled the trigger, Doug-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0013
rows.name: You were watching closely, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0014
rows.name: To repay a debt?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0015
rows.name: Yeah. My old man was a hedonist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0016
rows.name: He dumped an unbelievable amount of debt on me, then just suddenly kicked the bucket.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0017
rows.name: And I was just a young punk barely able to feed myself, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0018
rows.name: If I recall, wasn't there a legal system to renounce an inheritance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0019
rows.name: If I did that, it wouldn't be fair to the people who trusted my old man enough to lend him the money, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0020
rows.name: So you took on dangerous jobs...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0021
rows.name: I was fully aware of the risks to make that kind of money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_JNK0010
rows.name: Exasperation

rows.label: qev085707_SEL0011
rows.name: Honestly tell him he's an idiot.

rows.label: qev085707_JNK0020
rows.name: Empathy

rows.label: qev085707_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him you understand his feelings.

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0022
rows.name:
Oh, you don't hold back, do you?
Well, I know that myself, so you don't have to point it out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0023
rows.name:
That's the first time anyone's ever told me that.
You're a strange one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0024
rows.name: But Earth is already...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0025
rows.name: The debt, and the people I owed it to, vanished right along with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0026
rows.name: And yet you're still continuing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0027
rows.name: Yeah. I was thinking of building a luxurious grave for them using the exact same amount as the debt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0028
rows.name: Bad taste, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0029
rows.name: If you're aware of it, I have nothing to say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0030
rows.name:
We did some good work this time.
See ya.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0031
rows.name: Ah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0032
rows.name: What is wrong, Lin-san mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0033
rows.name: Doug-san didn't pay for his coffee here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085707_MSG0034
rows.name: Honestly, I can't tell if he's generous or stingy. What a mysterious person.[ST:wait ]
